description:
Immediate Start
Adelaide offices
Initial three (3) month assignment
 
Green Light Worldwide are currently looking for highly skilled Azure Engineers to join our delivery team. The successful consultants will join a dynamic, fast-paced environment where they will plan and build highly available cloud-based infrastructure.
 
Responsibilities:

Design, build and implement solutions in Azure.
Write Azure scripts using CLI, PowerShell, ARM.
Create Azure Automation to work across multiple platforms.
Focus on monitoring and alerting.
Deliver in an enterprise level environment.
Collaborate with other engineers to follow best practices.
Suggest ways to better improve existing processes and/or create additional ones to improve quality and efficiency.
Liaise with multiple stakeholders within the business.
 
Requirements:

Extensive experience in design and development of cloud-based solutions in Azure.
Strong understanding on Azure Iaas, Paas, Caas.
Demonstrated experience with Azure AD, Cybersecurity & Authentication – IDAM, OAuth.
Good experience in Azure Automation, DevOps CI/CD.
Proven ability to do Azure scripting using CLI, PowerShell, ARM.
Working knowledge on Analytics, Monitoring & Auditing, Alerting and Incident Management and Cost Management.
Past experience on Jump Hosts (Windows, Linux)
Hands on experience on Containers (App Servers, Kubernetes, Docker) will be highly regarded.
Solid stakeholder and vendor management skills
                              
Apply Now! For more information, contact Crissy on 0482072648 or email crissya@greenlightworldwide.com

We are an Australian onshore services company that provides technology capability across ANZ and Asia. Our services range from day-to-day operational activities, through project delivery, to more strategic and transformational programs. At Green Light, we are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone feels valued and respected. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

We encourage applications from all backgrounds and communities, and we are dedicated to providing a fair and accessible recruitment process for all candidates. During the recruitment process, if you require any accommodations or modifications please reach out to peopleandculture@greenlightworldwide.com or call +61 9247 3799.
